pub fn process_request(req: &Request) -> Response {
    let body = parse_body(req);
    todo!()
}

pub fn validate_input(data: &[u8]) -> Result<(), Error> {
    if data.is_empty() {
        return Err(Error::Empty);
    }
    todo!()
}

pub fn serialize_response(resp: &Response) -> Vec<u8> {
    todo!()
}

pub fn connect_to_database(url: &str) -> Connection {
    todo!()
}

struct Request;
struct Response;
enum Error { Empty }
struct Connection;
fn parse_body(_req: &Request) -> Vec<u8> { vec![] }
